org.docgene.model

Class XMLTree

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractStyledElement
      • org.docgene.model.XMLTree
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BorderedElement, org.docgene.model.conditions.ConditionElement<XMLTreeItem>, org.docgene.model.conditions.ConditionElementsContainer<XMLTreeItem>, ParagraphElement, ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement, TreeElement

    public class XMLTree
extends AbstractStyledElement
implements TreeElement, BorderedElement, org.docgene.model.conditions.ConditionElementsContainer<XMLTreeItem>, ParagraphElementParent
    Represent the content of an <tree> tag.
    Since:
    1.6.5.6

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE
